word: G495 - ἀντιπέραν - antipéran - an-tee-per'-an - Over against

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀντιπέραν

- Transliteration: Antiperan

- Phonetic: an-tee-per'-an

- Definition:

1. over against, on the opposite shore, on the other side

- Origin: from G473 and G4008

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G473 and G4008; on the opposite side: - over against.
